spots.name: Duomo di Milano
spots.description: The magnificent Gothic cathedral — climb to the rooftop for panoramic views.

spots.name: Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II
spots.description: Italy's oldest shopping gallery with breathtaking glass and iron architecture.

spots.name: Navigli District
spots.description: Canal-side neighborhood with art studios, boutiques, and aperitivo bars.

spots.name: Pavé
spots.description: Artisan bakery and café with some of Milan's best pastries and brunch.

spots.name: Orsonero Coffee
spots.description: Specialty coffee roaster with minimalist Milanese design sensibility.

spots.name: Marchesi 1824
spots.description: Prada-owned historic pastry shop — elegant interiors and exquisite pastries.

spots.name: Trattoria Milanese
spots.description: Classic Milanese cuisine since 1933 — the risotto alla milanese is legendary.

spots.name: Pescaria
spots.description: Fresh, fast seafood in a modern setting — the tuna burger is a must.

spots.name: Dry Milano
spots.description: Craft cocktails and gourmet pizza in a sleek, trendy atmosphere.

spots.name: Fondazione Prada
spots.description: Contemporary art space in a reimagined distillery — architecture by OMA.

spots.name: Bosco Verticale
spots.description: Award-winning vertical forest towers — a living masterpiece of green architecture.

spots.name: Cimitero Monumentale
spots.description: Open-air museum of sculptures and monuments — hauntingly beautiful.
